headline: How The Casella Waste Systems (CWST) Investment Story Is Shifting After Analyst Target Revisions
summary: Casella Waste Systems has seen its fair value estimate trimmed slightly to US$112.0 from US$112.8, a reduction of about 0.7% that keeps the price target essentially in the same ballpark. This adjustment lines up with recent research where analysts are fine tuning targets in the low US$100s and around US$110 to US$140, focusing on valuation, execution and growth expectations rather than making sweeping calls. Read on to see how to interpret these shifts and track the evolving analyst story...
